name: @starkware-libs/starknet-privacy-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for private transfers on Starknet — deposit, transfer, withdraw, and discover notes via a fluent builder API

scripts.scarb:build: cd .. && SCARB_IGNORE_CAIRO_VERSION=true scarb cache clean && SCARB_IGNORE_CAIRO_VERSION=true scarb build --features test_contracts
scripts.generate:cairo-refs: cd .. && SCARB_IGNORE_CAIRO_VERSION=true scarb test -p privacy -- --color always generate_reference --include-ignored 2>&1 | tee target/cairo-refs-output.txt && cd sdk && npx tsx scripts/generate-cairo-refs.ts ../target/cairo-refs-output.txt
scripts.generate: npm run scarb:build && npm run generate:abi && npm run generate:client-actions && npm run generate:cairo-hashes && npm run generate:pool-interface && npm run generate:cairo-refs
scripts.lint: prettier --check src/ tests/ && eslint src/ tests/ && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.format: prettier --write src/ tests/ && eslint --fix src/ tests/
scripts.all: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.check:fast: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test:fast
